text.title: terse-default-tool-output Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for terse-default-tool-output as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Summary mode that drops the IDs the agent needs to escalate to full mode.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: If the summary is not pointable, the agent has to re-search to get the same row. Always include the primary key in the terse shape.

failure-mode.description: Implicit truncation — silently cutting output to N tokens without telling the agent.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Model thinks it saw all results. Always return an explicit truncated: true flag plus the count it would have returned.
